scripts.build:bundled: node scripts/build-bundled.js && node scripts/with-env.js -u WEB_EXT_API_KEY -u WEB_EXT_API_SECRET -- web-ext build --source-dir dist/bundled-pkg --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest
scripts.e2e:serial: npm run e2e:chrome && npm run e2e:firefox
scripts.e2e:chrome: node scripts/with-env.js SAVE_IN_E2E=1 -- node scripts/build-bundled.js && node scripts/with-env.js SAVE_IN_E2E=1 EXT_DIR=dist/bundled-pkg -- vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.mjs e2e/chrome.e2e.mjs
scripts.e2e:firefox: node scripts/with-env.js SAVE_IN_E2E=1 -- node scripts/build-bundled.js && node scripts/with-env.js SAVE_IN_E2E=1 EXT_DIR=dist/bundled-pkg -- vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.mjs e2e/firefox.e2e.mjs
scripts.lint: node scripts/check-import-cycles.js && node scripts/build-bundled.js && web-ext lint --source-dir dist/bundled-pkg -i "src/**" && oxlint && oxfmt --check
